mapper.sql: a.id ,a.prod_name ,a.combination_name ,a.prod_descript ,a.internet_mno_id ,a.tv_prod_name ,a.channel_count ,a.internet_speed ,a.combination_price ,a.combination_freeble_price ,a.use_yn ,a.order_no ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,b.name AS internetMno
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_internet_plan_list_new a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_mno b ON a.internet_mno_id = b.id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_pmb_internet_plan_list_new a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_mno b ON a.internet_mno_id = b.id WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_internet_plan_list_new a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_mno b ON a.internet_mno_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update tb_pmb_internet_mno SET modified_id = #{modifiedId},
use_yn = #{useYn},
new_use_yn = #{newUseYn},
order_no = #{orderNo},
modified_date = Now() WHERE id = #{id}
